features: Kashmiri Mongra Saffron - Kashmiri Mongra Saffron is renowned as one of the finest and most sought-after varieties of saffron in the world. It is cultivated in the Kashmir region of India.

Ethically Sourced – Organic Spree Saffron (Kesar) stigmas are meticulously handpicked, and only the best stigmas are chosen to pack. Mongra flowers are handpicked and processed manually to get silky threads called Saffron Mongra which is considered the best quality Saffron grade in the world.
Grade A++ Certified – Organic Spree Kashmiri Saffron (Kesar) is recognized as the highest quality premium grade saffron spice.
Pure and Natural - No additives, artificial colours or preservatives are used in our all red pure Organic Spree Saffron.
description: Product Description Experience the Richness of Handpicked Saffron Creamy Saffron Milk- Silky smooth milk enriched with saffron, offering a luxurious taste and aroma, ideal for relaxation or as a soothing beverage. Vibrant Saffron Rice- A fragrant dish infused with saffron, adding a rich yellow hue and unique flavor, perfect as a side or main course. Decadent Saffron Dessert - Indulgent desserts crafted with saffron, providing a rich flavor and color, elevating any sweet treat to gourmet status. Delightful Saffron Milkshake- A refreshing milkshake blended with saffron, delivering a creamy, aromatic experience in every sip.
